# BP-117 positive: Echo Bind is used as a bare statement.
lang: go
file: BP-117-vulnerable.go
variant: echo
---
package sample

import "github.com/labstack/echo/v4"

type Request struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func create(c echo.Context) error {
	var request Request
	c.Bind(&request)
	return nil
}
